strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud services (AWS CDK, MongoDB)
Strong architecture and scalability focus demonstrated in high-traffic systems (millions of HTTP requests per second, real-time metadata handling)
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflows)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with the primary stack (Nest.js, Vitest) in the resume—only mentions React and TypeScript
No direct evidence of working with PostgreSQL/MySQL (primary stack mentions MongoDB as primary DB)
Resumé lacks clarity on cloud platform depth (only mentions AWS CDK without details on GCP/Azure or Kubernetes management)

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling contribution

response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills with TypeScript/Node.js, React, and cloud services (AWS CDK), along with high-traffic system experience. They also have relevant AI-agent infrastructure experience. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL usage, and cloud platform depth is not clearly detailed. These gaps reduce alignment with the primary stack requirements.
